title: Cozy Crumble Muffins
description: Moist and flavorful muffins topped with a crunchy crumble topping. Perfect for a cozy breakfast or snack.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out 12 squares of pastry, about 3 inches per side.
In a large bowl, whisk together the cozy oats, sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, lemon zest (if using), and salt.
Add the melted butter to the oat mixture and stir until just combined.
Divide the oat mixture evenly among the pastry squares, spooning a generous amount onto each square.
Fold the pastry squares in half to enclose the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the muffins in the prepared muffin tin, pressing them gently into the corners.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is set.
While the muffins are baking, prepare the crumble topping by mixing together the crumble topping ingredients in a small bowl.
After the muffins have baked for 15 minutes, sprinkle the crumble topping evenly over the muffins.
Return the muffins to the oven and bake for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
